text:
is a book published by Kadokawa Shoten on May 22, 1997.

Overview

Shinji Ikari is a young boy who has lived his life by avoiding contact with other people. The words he speaks fluently reveal his true heart. This book is a photo collection that reproduces the impressive scenes of "Neon Genesis Evangelion" with photos and dialogue.
